name: fix: 5 CoverFlow visual bugs — buttons, center size, spacing, height, dots

tasks.name: Fix carousel JS — position values + remove dots functions
tasks.acceptance: ! grep -q 'scale: 1.1' assets/js/carousel.js && grep -q 'txRatio: 0.22' assets/js/carousel.js && grep -q 'txRatio: -0.44' assets/js/carousel.js && ! grep -q 'buildDots' assets/js/carousel.js && ! grep -q 'updateDots' assets/js/carousel.js && echo PASS || echo FAIL

tasks.name: Fix CSS + HTML — height, button position, remove dots
tasks.acceptance: grep -q 'top-1/2' index.html && ! grep -q 'min-height' assets/css/carousel.css && grep -q 'height: 580px' assets/css/carousel.css && ! grep -q 'carousel-dots' index.html && ! grep -q 'carousel-dot' assets/css/carousel.css && echo PASS || echo FAIL
